debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
⊢ 0 ∉ uIcc a b

proof:
simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · simp [min_eq_left hab, max_eq_right hab]
      left
      exact ha
    · push_neg at hab
      simp [min_eq_right (le_of_lt hab), max_eq_left (le_of_lt hab)]
      left
      exact hb
failed_attempts:
simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    left
    exact ha

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and, not_le]
    intro _
    exact lt_min ha hb

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · simp [inf_eq_min, sup_eq_max, min_eq_left hab, max_eq_right hab]
      left
      exact ha
    · push_neg at hab
      simp [inf_eq_min, sup_eq_max, min_eq_right (le_of_lt hab), max_eq_left (le_of_lt hab)]
      left
      exact hb

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · simp [inf_eq_min, sup_eq_max, min_eq_left hab, max_eq_right hab]
      left

    · push_neg at hab
      simp [inf_eq_min, sup_eq_max, min_eq_right (le_of_lt hab), max_eq_left (le_of_lt hab)]
      left
      exact hb

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    left
    exact min_pos ha hb

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    left
    exact min_pos ha hb

simp only [Set.mem_uIcc, not_and_or, not_le]
    left
    left
    exact ha

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · simp [inf_eq_min, sup_eq_max, min_eq_left hab, max_eq_right hab]
      left

    · push_neg at hab
      simp [inf_eq_min, sup_eq_max, min_eq_right (le_of_lt hab), max_eq_left (le_of_lt hab)]
      left

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    left
    exact min_pos ha hb

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]
    left
    exact Or.inl (ne_of_gt (lt_min ha hb))

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, sup_eq_max, inf_eq_min, not_and, not_le]
    intro h
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_min ha hb) h

simp only [uIcc_of_le, mem_Icc, not_and, not_le]
    intro _
    by_cases hab : a ≤ b
    · simp only [uIcc_of_le hab, mem_Icc, not_and, not_le]
      exact fun _ => hb
    · simp only [uIcc_of_ge (le_of_not_le hab), mem_Icc, not_and, not_le]
      exact fun _ => ha

simp only [mem_Icc, not_and, not_le]
      intro h
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le ha h
    all_goals
      simp only [Set.mem_Icc, not_and, not_le]
      intro h
      exact ha

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and_or, not_le]

simp only [uIcc, mem_Icc, not_and, not_le]

    · simp only [uIcc_of_ge (le_of_not_le hab), mem_Icc, not_and, not_le]
